experience.title: Experience
experience.shortBio: Building accessible, pixel-perfect digital experiences ── user-centered design & technical innovation

intro.headline: Fullstack Engineer · Design Engineer
intro.p2: I enjoy exploring new ways to express myself without limitations, drawn to the details that most people never notice but always feel ── Bridging the gap between user-centered design & technical problem solving through applications, interfaces & interactions
intro.p3: I’ve been fortunate to work with teams at {baf}, {deloitte}, and {codeid} & others.

codeidFront.desc: Leading to maintain a multi-platform UI framework. Bridging the gap between brand design and complex frontend implementations.

codeidSpecialist.desc: An integrated position involving project management, UI/UX design, business analysis, and manual QA testing to ensure the delivery of a robust, user-centered application.

bafFront.desc: Responsible for developing functional code, website maintenance and enhancements for internal web based sales order management system. Application used by sales to input order data and monitor order status.

uob.title: UOB Infinity
uob.desc: Contributed to UOB Infinity digital banking by developing secure payment features, optimizing transaction workflows, and delivering responsive user experiences.

sandiabaf.title: Sandia BAF
sandiabaf.desc: Engineered finance solutions for sales and credit management, streamlining business processes through modern web technologies and scalable application architecture.

telkomedika.title: Telkomedika
telkomedika.desc: Built AI-powered healthcare platforms that provide health monitoring, medical analytics, and intelligent dashboards to support patient care and operational efficiency.
